author: lOrm
content: Landed agent-scoped shell cleanup. Added agent_id: Option<String> to BackgroundShell, populated via new BackgroundShellManager::spawn_with_agent(command, agent_id) (spawn() unchanged — calls spawn_with_agent(.., None)). Added kill_shell_tasks_for_agent(agent_id) which iterates the shell map, terminates every shell whose agent_id matches via terminate_process_tree, and removes the entry. Re-exported as tools::kill_shell_tasks_for_agent and routed through BACKGROUND_SHELLS singleton. 2 tests pin: unowned shells survive a targeted kill / targeted kill removes only shells owned by the named agent.
